title: The Altar Stairs
writer: G.B. Lancaster, George Hively, Doris Schroeder
actors: Frank Mayo, Louise Lorraine, Lawrence Hughes
plot: On an island in the South Seas, derelict Tony Heritage is rescued from savage natives by trader and ship captain Rod McLean, but repays him by stealing Rod's money and fleeing to France. There, Heritage marries a young French woma...
